title: Eva Units and Gender References
wikitext:
[]: Eva Units and Gender References             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Sat Feb 18, 2012 7:23 am If I'm not mistaken, the first two pilots selected for the role as pilots were exclusively female, Shinji broke the mold by being male. Eva if I remember right were also exclusively female. First thing that caught my attention - why is it plug suits are skin tight and the plug system thingy looks like a giant tampon. It's interesting to note that the umbilic cord also connects to that same region. Is that a reference? There's the episode where an Angel penetrates an Eva's power core and then the self conscious bit of Rei wanting to be one with Ikari. Is that an Eva looking pregnant and then showing innocence just before it explodes and dies? Aska as subconcious issues - menstrual is mentioned in the anime at one point. I believe her NOT wanting children was another. Her whole Eva during that episode is completely frozen. Shinji's Eva unit more or less rejects the process. Another reference? One last thing, the only Eva go go berserk of it's own free will had a male pilot. The other two were either tampered with or infected by an angel.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Feb 18, 2012 3:56 pm Uh...tampons do not go into the back of the neck. Plug suits are skin tight because it's science fiction-y. Eva 00 has gone Berserk on it's own atleast twice, and Unit 02 apparently went berserk during the Harpie battle. You ignore that Ritsuko said immediately after Misato suggested it that things like menstruating don't effect the Eva; it and the pilot connect purely on a mental level.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 18, 2012 4:06 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Uh...tampons do not go into the back of the neck.

[]: Re: Eva Units and Gender References             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Feb 19, 2012 12:34 am Radical Lanzar wrote: There's the episode where an Angel penetrates an Eva's power core and then the self conscious bit of Rei wanting to be one with Ikari. Is that an Eva looking pregnant and then showing innocence just before it explodes and dies?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 19, 2012 1:00 am Armisael also looks kind of like an umbilical cord, the way it burrows into Eva-00's abdomen. The symbolic progression is a bit wonky... Eva-00 goes from being a baby in utero, to giving birth, to being pregnant? Wha?

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Feb 19, 2012 1:15 am Reichu wrote: Armisael also looks kind of like an umbilical cord, the way it burrows into Eva-00's abdomen. The symbolic progression is a bit wonky... Eva-00 goes from being a baby in utero, to giving birth, to being pregnant? Wha?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Feb 19, 2012 1:30 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: Perhaps the transition between the two symbolises a loss of innocence.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Sun Feb 19, 2012 1:57 am Na7e wrote: That would be much more believable if it was in utero to pregnant then finally giving birth.

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Sun Feb 19, 2012 7:19 pm AuraTwilight wrote: You ignore that Ritsuko said immediately after Misato suggested it that things like menstruating don't effect the Eva; it and the pilot connect purely on a mental level.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Feb 19, 2012 8:08 pm Radical Lanzar wrote: That's not what I meant. The whole mental thing is what I'm curious about. Eva Unit 01 goes berserker, mostly when Shinji goes frantic and becomes chaotic.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Feb 19, 2012 8:57 pm I'm just going to clear up a few things here... Na7e wrote: No. The only time the Unit-01 goes berserk is when Shinji loses consciousness.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Feb 19, 2012 9:26 pm Fazmotron wrote: Shinji never loses conciousness when piloting, the the first time he piloted and the Eva went berserk he blocked out and only remembered later, but he was definitely concious.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Feb 19, 2012 9:52 pm Na7e wrote: If you meant to say black out, then yes he did lose consciousness. They show us the battle. He wasn't conscious for it. He clunked out after feeling a spear of energy pierce his eye, and then stirred after Sachiel detonated. The following scene confirms this.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Sun Feb 19, 2012 10:15 pm Sachi wrote: Remember that Shinji had a flashback of the entire battle at the end of episode 02. He would have to have been conscious in order to recall the memory after the fact. Yes, he blacked out, but he didn't pass out, and the information was still stored in his memory to be able to retrieve later.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Feb 20, 2012 6:27 pm Fazmotron wrote: Shinji never loses conciousness when piloting, the the first time he piloted and the Eva went berserk he blocked out and only remembered later, but he was definitely concious.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 20, 2012 7:36 pm Bagheera wrote: though in Unit 02's case that might be more at Asuka's prodding than anything else; there's probably not enough of Kyoko in there to act independently anyway

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Feb 20, 2012 7:58 pm Reichu wrote: What happened to "seriously questioning the notion that anything of real significance was left" inside post-CE Kyoko? (Or should I not go there?)

[]:             Quote Post by Mt Olympus » Sun Feb 26, 2012 6:09 am I don't know... was just reminded of this scene...

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Fri Mar 23, 2012 2:28 pm I thought that the Seeds of Life were hermaphrodites. They'd have to be, to produce any offspring.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 23, 2012 7:28 pm Atropos wrote: I thought that the Seeds of Life were hermaphrodites. They'd have to be, to produce any offspring.
